column2: Verify System Rejects Battery Fire User Story
column3: ['Launch the application. ', 'Navigate to the user story creation page. ', "Enter a title for the new user story (e.  , 'Battery Fire Risk'). ", 'Save the newly created user story. ']
column4: ['Application opens successfully. ', 'User is on the user story creation page. ', 'Title of the new user story has been entered correctly. ', 'Risk category and location have been selected correctly. ', 'Description of the new user story has been entered correctly. ', 'The system displays an error message indicating that such a user story is not allowed. ']
